args.Description: Add TV Broadcasting Network models and relations to Tenant/MediaAsset in schema.prisma
args.Instruction: Add TV broadcasting database models and relations to existing Tenant and MediaAsset models.

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent:
radioStations           RadioStation[]
  radioPrograms           RadioProgram[]
  radioSchedules          RadioSchedule[]
  radioPlaylists          RadioPlaylist[]
  radioBroadcastArchives  RadioBroadcastArchive[]
  radioChatMessages       RadioChatMessage[]
  radioReactions          RadioReaction[]

  tvChannels              TvChannel[]
  tvPrograms              TvProgram[]
  tvSchedules             TvSchedule[]
  tvPlaylists             TvPlaylist[]
  tvBroadcastArchives     TvBroadcastArchive[]
  tvChatMessages          TvChatMessage[]
  tvReactions             TvReaction[]
  tvPolls                 TvPoll[]
  tvLowerThirds           TvLowerThird[]
ReplacementChunks.TargetContent:
radioStations           RadioStation[]
  radioPrograms           RadioProgram[]
  radioSchedules          RadioSchedule[]
  radioPlaylists          RadioPlaylist[]
  radioBroadcastArchives  RadioBroadcastArchive[]
  radioChatMessages       RadioChatMessage[]
  radioReactions          RadioReaction[]

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent:
assetTags      MediaAssetTag[]
  playlistItems  MediaPlaylistItem[]
  radioPlaylistItems RadioPlaylistItem[]
  tvPlaylistItems    TvPlaylistItem[]
  tvBroadcastArchives TvBroadcastArchive[]
  livestreams    Livestream[]
  sermonServices ChurchService[]     @relation("SermonMedia")
  audioServices  ChurchService[]     @relation("ServiceAudio")
  aiMediaJobs    AiMediaJob[]
  mediaCaptions  MediaCaption[]
ReplacementChunks.TargetContent:
assetTags      MediaAssetTag[]
  playlistItems  MediaPlaylistItem[]
  radioPlaylistItems RadioPlaylistItem[]
  livestreams    Livestream[]
  sermonServices ChurchService[]     @relation("SermonMedia")
  audioServices  ChurchService[]     @relation("ServiceAudio")
  aiMediaJobs    AiMediaJob[]
  mediaCaptions  MediaCaption[]

ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent:
@@map("radio_reactions")
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// TV & VIDEO BROADCASTING NETWORK MODULE
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

model TvChannel {
  id                        String                  @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId                  String                  @map("tenant_id")
  name                      String
  slug                      String
  slogan                    String?
  description               String?
  logoUrl                   String?                 @map("logo_url")
  coverImageUrl             String?                 @map("cover_image_url")
  socialLinks               String                  @default("[]") @map("social_links")
  streamType                String                  @default("managed") @map("stream_type")
  streamProvider            String?                 @map("stream_provider")
  streamUrl                 String?                 @map("stream_url")
  streamKey                 String?                 @map("stream_key")
  status                    String                  @default("offline") @map("status")
  isAutoProgrammingEnabled  Boolean                 @default(true) @map("is_auto_programming_enabled")
  createdAt                 DateTime                @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt                 DateTime                @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant                    Tenant                  @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  programs                  TvProgram[]
  playlists                 TvPlaylist[]
  archives                  TvBroadcastArchive[]
  chatMessages              TvChatMessage[]
  reactions                 TvReaction[]
  polls                     TvPoll[]
  lowerThirds               TvLowerThird[]

  @@unique([tenantId, slug])
  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("tv_channels")
}

model TvProgram {
  id          String                  @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId    String                  @map("tenant_id")
  channelId   String                  @map("channel_id")
  title       String
  slug        String
  description String?
  speaker     String?
  category    String
  createdAt   DateTime                @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt   DateTime                @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant      Tenant                  @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel     TvChannel               @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  schedules   TvSchedule[]
  archives    TvBroadcastArchive[]

  @@unique([tenantId, channelId, slug])
  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@map("tv_programs")
}

model TvSchedule {
  id             String               @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId       String               @map("tenant_id")
  programId      String               @map("program_id")
  startTime      DateTime             @map("start_time")
  endTime        DateTime             @map("end_time")
  recurrence     String               @default("none") @map("recurrence")
  daysOfWeek     String?              @map("days_of_week")
  createdAt      DateTime             @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt      DateTime             @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant         Tenant               @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  program        TvProgram            @relation(fields: [programId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([programId])
  @@map("tv_schedules")
}

model TvPlaylist {
  id                String            @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId          String            @map("tenant_id")
  channelId         String            @map("channel_id")
  name              String
  isAutoProgramming Boolean           @default(false) @map("is_auto_programming")
  rotationRule      String            @default("random") @map("rotation_rule")
  createdAt         DateTime          @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt         DateTime          @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant            Tenant            @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel           TvChannel         @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  items             TvPlaylistItem[]

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@map("tv_playlists")
}

model TvPlaylistItem {
  id               String             @id @default(uuid())
  playlistId       String             @map("playlist_id")
  mediaAssetId     String?            @map("media_asset_id")
  title            String
  videoUrl         String             @map("video_url")
  durationSeconds  Int?               @map("duration_seconds")
  sortOrder        Int                @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  createdAt        DateTime           @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime           @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  playlist         TvPlaylist         @relation(fields: [playlistId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  mediaAsset       MediaAsset?        @relation(fields: [mediaAssetId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([playlistId])
  @@map("tv_playlist_items")
}

model TvBroadcastArchive {
  id               String             @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId         String             @map("tenant_id")
  channelId        String             @map("channel_id")
  programId        String?            @map("program_id")
  title            String
  videoUrl         String             @map("video_url")
  durationSeconds  Int?               @map("duration_seconds")
  fileSize         Int?               @map("file_size")
  recordedAt       DateTime           @default(now()) @map("recorded_at")
  isMediaAsset     Boolean            @default(false) @map("is_media_asset")
  mediaAssetId     String?            @map("media_asset_id")
  createdAt        DateTime           @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime           @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant           Tenant             @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel          TvChannel          @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  program          TvProgram?         @relation(fields: [programId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  mediaAsset       MediaAsset?        @relation(fields: [mediaAssetId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@index([programId])
  @@map("tv_broadcast_archives")
}

model TvChatMessage {
  id           String                 @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId     String                 @map("tenant_id")
  channelId    String                 @map("channel_id")
  userId       String?                @map("user_id")
  displayName  String                 @map("display_name")
  message      String
  countryCode  String?                @map("country_code")
  userRole     String?                @map("user_role")
  createdAt    DateTime               @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  tenant       Tenant                 @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel      TvChannel              @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@map("tv_chat_messages")
}

model TvReaction {
  id           String                 @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId     String                 @map("tenant_id")
  channelId    String                 @map("channel_id")
  reactionType String                 @map("reaction_type")
  createdAt    DateTime               @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  tenant       Tenant                 @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel      TvChannel              @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@map("tv_reactions")
}

model TvPoll {
  id           String                 @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId     String                 @map("tenant_id")
  channelId    String                 @map("channel_id")
  question     String
  options      String                 @default("[]") @map("options")
  isActive     Boolean                @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt    DateTime               @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime               @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant       Tenant                 @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel      TvChannel              @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  responses    TvPollResponse[]

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@map("tv_polls")
}

model TvPollResponse {
  id           String                 @id @default(uuid())
  pollId       String                 @map("poll_id")
  userId       String?                @map("user_id")
  option       String
  createdAt    DateTime               @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  poll         TvPoll                 @relation(fields: [pollId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([pollId])
  @@map("tv_poll_responses")
}

model TvLowerThird {
  id           String                 @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId     String                 @map("tenant_id")
  channelId    String                 @map("channel_id")
  type         String                 @map("type")
  title        String
  subtitle     String?
  buttonText   String?                @map("button_text")
  actionUrl    String?                @map("action_url")
  startTime    DateTime               @map("start_time")
  endTime      DateTime               @map("end_time")
  position     String                 @default("bottom-left") @map("position")
  audience     String                 @default("all") @map("audience")
  isActive     Boolean                @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt    DateTime               @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime               @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant       Tenant                 @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  channel      TvChannel              @relation(fields: [channelId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([channelId])
  @@map("tv_lower_thirds")
}
